book_summary: Numbers has chapters 1-7 complete in restored/source-audited draft and mystical companion layers. The opening wilderness block covers census, camp arrangement around the dwelling-place, Levite substitution, transport duties, camp purity, restitution, the suspected-adultery ordeal under explicit ethical critique, voluntary Nazirite consecration, the Aaronic blessing, and the twelve-day altar dedication in which every tribe brings the same offering and resources are matched to actual service burden.

chapters.notes: Transport gifts distributed according to burden, twelve equal tribal dedication offerings, dedication totals, and Divine voice from above the ark.

translation_notes: Numbers/Bemidbar begins in the wilderness with communal organization around Divine presence.
Military-age census language is descriptive of camp organization and must not define human worth.
Those outside the census remain fully within the covenant community.
The camp is organized around the dwelling-place; Presence, not military power, occupies the center.
Numbers 5 suspected-adultery ordeal is an ancient patriarchal, asymmetrical, coercive procedure and must never be reenacted.
Numbers 6 Nazirite vow is voluntary, time-bounded, and open to man or woman.
The Aaronic blessing culminates in shalom—peace, wholeness, well-being, and restored relationship.
Numbers 7 repetition is intentional: every tribe receives equal narrative space and brings the same offering.
Transport resources are matched to service burden; equal dignity does not require identical equipment.
Numbers 7 ends not in donor prestige but in YHWH's voice speaking from above the ark.
Mystical companion layer remains interpretive and does not replace source-audited restored text.
source_witness_audit_flags: Numbers 7 repeated offering formulas require textual-witness consistency audit.
Numbers 7 wagon/ox distribution should crosslink with Numbers 4 transport duties.
Numbers 7 tribal order requires comparison with Numbers 2 camp and marching order.
Numbers 7 dedication totals require arithmetic and sanctuary-shekel audit.
Numbers 7:89 Divine voice above the cover should crosslink with Exodus 25 and Moses' tent-of-meeting speech traditions.
next_actions: Continue Numbers with chapter 8: lampstand lighting, Levite cleansing and wave presentation, substitution for firstborn, service ages, and retirement from heavy service with anti-ageism safeguards.
